description:
Replace the bootstrap ci.yml with a full multi-job CI pipeline once the core MCP implementation is complete and building cleanly.

## Jobs to implement
- install — pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
- build — pnpm run build (tsc, real compile)
- test — pnpm exec vitest run --coverage
- format — pnpm exec prettier --check .
- audit — pnpm audit --audit-level=high

Each job runs independently (parallel after install). All use Node 20 + pnpm cache.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All 5 jobs pass on a clean branch
- Coverage report uploaded as artifact
- pnpm run build compiles src/ to build/ successfully
title: Setup GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline

descriptionHistory.description:
Create GitHub Actions workflows for build, test, format check, and security audit.

## Files to create
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — runs on PR and push to main
  - Jobs: `build` (tsc --noEmit), `test` (vitest run), `format` (prettier --check), `audit` (pnpm audit)
- All jobs use `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`
- Node.js 20, ubuntu-latest

## Acceptance Criteria
- All 4 checks pass on a clean repo
- PRs cannot merge without all checks green

Replace the bootstrap ci.yml with a full multi-job CI pipeline once the core MCP implementation is complete and building cleanly.

## Jobs to implement
- install — pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
- build — pnpm run build (tsc, real compile)
- test — pnpm exec vitest run --coverage
- format — pnpm exec prettier --check .
- audit — pnpm audit --audit-level=high

Each job runs independently (parallel after install). All use Node 20 + pnpm cache.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All 5 jobs pass on a clean branch
- Coverage report uploaded as artifact
- pnpm run build compiles src/ to build/ successfully
